items.content_statement: Recognize a complex range of emotions and describe how events or thoughts can prompt emotions
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when situations call for emotional recognition and causal analysis - Type 2

items.content_statement: Explain how others' responses to situations can impact their emotions and behaviors
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability for understanding social-emotional causation when prompted by specific scenarios - Type 2

items.content_statement: Identify interests and demonstrate strengths that inform decision-making toward accomplishing an academic or social goal
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when goal-setting situations arise - Type 2

items.content_statement: Reframe a challenge or setback into a positive opportunity
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when challenges arise - Type 2

items.content_statement: Set priorities to leverage personal strengths to meet a need or address a personal or community challenge
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when priority-setting situations arise - Type 2

items.content_statement: Consider possible consequences, both positive and negative, before expressing an emotion or taking action
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when a situation calls for it - reasoning about consequences before action

items.content_statement: Examine available support systems and coping skills to identify those that can help process thoughts and manage emotions and stress
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when situations call for it - evaluating resources for emotional management

items.content_statement: Develop a plan and identify school, family, and community resources that may assist in achieving a goal
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when goal-setting situations arise - strategic planning and resource identification

items.content_statement: Monitor progress toward a specific goal by developing check-points or adjusting the plan as needed
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when managing goals - evaluating progress and adapting strategies

items.content_statement: Demonstrate basic self-advocacy academically and socially
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation enacted across contexts - self-advocacy as a default practice

items.content_statement: Demonstrate the ability to persevere and maintain confidence through challenges
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation enacted across contexts - perseverance and confidence as default orientations during difficulty

items.content_statement: Explain and understand the inherent value of different cultures and social groups
items.classification_rationale: Propositional knowledge about cultural value that must be understood

items.content_statement: Acknowledge when the viewpoints or perceptions of others are different and treat differences with respect
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation enacted by default in interactions with others

items.content_statement: Recognize and describe unfairness and injustice in many forms including attitudes, speech, behaviors, policies, practices, and laws
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when situations call for identifying injustice

items.content_statement: Practice empathizing with others' thoughts, perspectives, and emotions, even when they are different from their own
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation of empathy enacted by default across contexts

items.content_statement: Express gratitude for others, including those with different perspectives
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation of gratitude enacted by default in relationships

items.content_statement: Be a contributor in our school community and encourage others to participate in contributing to the well-being of self and others
items.classification_rationale: Sustained orientation of community contribution enacted by default across school contexts

items.content_statement: Participate in positive personal and school relationships
items.classification_rationale: Describes a sustained default orientation - participating in positive relationships is an ongoing enacted capacity across contexts, not occasion-triggered

items.content_statement: Develop strategies for collaborating with others by valuing and encouraging different and diverse perspectives and abilities
items.classification_rationale: Describes analytical capability deployed when collaboration situations arise - developing strategies involves reasoning about multiple approaches and contexts

items.content_statement: Offer and acknowledge constructive feedback to strengthen connections and improve communication outcomes with others
items.classification_rationale: Describes occasion-triggered skill - offering and acknowledging feedback is deployed when communication situations call for it, involves reasoning about quality and impact

items.content_statement: Interact on social and digital media responsibly and understand the potential impact on reputation and relationships
items.classification_rationale: Describes occasion-triggered analytical skill - responsible interaction requires reasoning about consequences and context when using media platforms

items.content_statement: Demonstrate personal responsibility in reaching resolution and identify and access positive support when needed in a conflict situation or crisis
items.classification_rationale: Describes occasion-triggered analytical skill - demonstrating responsibility and identifying support requires reasoning about situations and options when conflicts or crises arise

items.content_statement: Identify the impact of personal decisions on relationships and academic, physical, and emotional well-being
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when evaluating decisions - requires reasoning across multiple domains

items.content_statement: Gather evidence and apply the steps of a decision-making process to support and solve academic, physical, and/or emotional challenges
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when facing challenges - involves reasoning and evidence evaluation

items.content_statement: Identify the pros and cons of the decision(s) made or options considered
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when evaluating decisions - requires reasoning about trade-offs

items.content_statement: Use what they have learned from past experiences to help guide future decisions
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when making decisions - involves reasoning from experience

items.content_statement: Take the perspective of those they want to help and consider their feelings and needs
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when helping others - requires perspective-taking reasoning

items.content_statement: Use negotiation and refusal skills to resist unwanted pressures and maintain well-being and personal safety
items.classification_rationale: Analytical capability deployed when facing pressures - requires reasoning about responses and consequences
